dialogos.texto_en: Oh, there you are.\nI've been looking for you.
Huh? Futaro-kun?
Big bro,\nweren't you with Yotsuba-san?
I wanted to ask both of you something.\nWe're both doing our own thing now.
What did you want to ask us?
Is there anything you want to do after this?\nLike sightseeing or shopping?
Hmm, take a nap?
No.
Whaaa?\nYou said anything was fine, though.
Well, do you think the others would agree?
Alright, alright. I'll give you a proper answer.
You should have done that from the beginning.
Hmm.\nI think I might want to go parasailing again.\nFloating in the air was really exhilarating.
Indeed, that unique sensation of floating\ncan't be experienced anywhere else.
Yeah, I felt like a bird!
I wish I could fly freely like that, too.
So freely, huh.
If you really want to experience the feeling\nof flying like a bird,\nwe could try a motorized paraglider.
Umm... Huh? What's that?
Well, to put it simply,\nit's a paraglider with a propeller-driven engine\nthat lets you fly in the air.
An engine?
Your explanation is too simple...
Alright, then, Sensei, please explain!
Listen, Raiha.\nRemember when we went parasailing earlier?
Instead of being pulled by a boat,\nwith a motorized paraglider,\nyou fly with a propeller attached to your back.
That's right.\nSo, you can fly wherever you want.
Hmmm...\nThat sounds fun, but what if we crash?
That won't be a problem.\nThere will be a pilot with us.
The pilots will be the one to work the engine,\nso all we need to do is sit back and enjoy the ride!
Wow.\nIn that case, that sounds safe, and fun!
But, is there a place where we can do that in Okinawa?\nGo on a motorized paraglider.
I haven't checked, but I think there might be.
Wait, you said that without even knowing we could?
But the scenery is so beautiful here.\nIt's a tourist destination after all,\nso they might offer something like that.
Well, let's put motor paragliding down\nas a candidate for now.
I wonder if I'll be able to do it too?\nIt might say that only adults can do it.
Oh, right.\nThere might be age and height restrictions.
I'm sure we can see some amazing scenery.
Right? It would be amazing to see a group of dolphins\nfrom the sky.
Yeah, flying over a coral reef would be perfect.
However, what you can see depends on how high you fly.
I wonder if they take requests\nfor what you want to see beforehand?
Who knows?\nFor safety reasons,\nthe course might already be set.
Well, let's put motor paragliding down\nas a candidate for now.
I wonder if I can do it too?\nIt might say that only adults can do it.
Oh, right.\nThere might be age and height restrictions.
Flying high without a care sounds really nice.
Yeah, I think there's a different kind of fun to it\ncompared to parasailing.
I could really feel what it's like to be a bird!
After all, flying freely in the sky has always\nbeen common dream amongst humans.\nJust imagining it gets me excited!
Ahaha, you're really honest\nabout following your desires, aren't you.
I'll check if there are any tours\nwhere we can experience it later.
Well, let's put motor paragliding down\nas a candidate for now.
I wonder if I can do it too?\nIt might say that only adults can do it.
Oh, right.\nThere might be age and height restrictions.
Since there would be a pilot with you,\nI think that middle school students would\nbe above the age limit.
I hope so.
However, we haven't decided\non motor paragliding yet, have we?
Besides, we don't even know if they offer it.\nOther people might have different opinions too.
Have you asked everyone yet?
No, not everyone.
I think the others will have different things they want to see,\nyou know? Okinawa really has so many places \nto see and things to do.
And ALSO,\nyou guys never seem to agree on anything.
If it turns into a big fight,\nwe'll leave it up to you again, Futaro-kun.\nEveryone will listen to you and behave.
I don't know about that.\nI can already imagine someone saying\nthey want to do everything.
Oh, that's a good idea.
I also agree on doing everything!
If Raiha-chan agrees,\nYotsuba and Itsuki-chan will definitely fold.
No, no, doing everything is impossible.\nRaiha, you should be a little more considerate.
Alrighty.
Then, I'll go ask the others too.\nTalk to you later.
Yep, see ya.
